<parameter=code>
# The green square is at cols 42-44, needs to be at cols 45-47 to be inside the box

# Check the ASCII

    if 26 <= i <= 33:
        print(f"Row {i}: {line[8:55]}")

nodes = seg['nodes']
print("\nSmall objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] < 200:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
